## Frontend Task

### Description
Describe the UI/HTML/CSS change needed.

### What to implement
- What section of the page?
- What elements (e.g., <nav>, <video>, <form>)?

### Expected Outcome
What should it look like or do after completion?

### Checklist
- [ ] Update HTML structure
- [ ] Apply styling (if needed)
- [ ] Test in browser
- [ ] Verify responsiveness

### Notes
Any extra context or links.
